command_log.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then echo 'javascript'; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then echo 'rust'; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then echo 'go'; else echo 'unknown'; fi

steps.output:
## unknown Analysis
No detailed analyzer for this language yet.
File count: 265

command_log.command: LANG=$(cat .wheel/outputs/detected-language.txt) && echo "## ${LANG} Analysis" && echo 'No detailed analyzer for this language yet.' && echo "File count: $(find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"

for sf in /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $sf) ==="; jq '{workflow_name, cursor, status, completed_steps: (.completed_steps // [] | length), total_steps: (.workflow.steps | length)}' "$sf" 2>/dev/null; done

cat > /Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/reports/language-analysis.md << 'REPORT_EOF'

STATE_FILE="/Users/ryansuematsu/Documents/github/personal/ai-repo-template/.wheel/state_0f1fe6bf-0236-4f54-bd9b-71b6b375a9bd_a1c81efd4b0a76f5b.json" && if [ -f "$STATE_FILE" ]; then jq '{workflow_name, status, cursor, write_report_status: .steps[4].status}' "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "State file GONE (archived)"; fi
